moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam of the year, is set to begin on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and epic serves! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday, June 29th. Who are you backing for the title this year?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: The greatest tennis tournament in the world is back! Wimbledon returns to London on Monday. Will you be soaking up the atmosphere?

moments.title: England's World Cup Clash
moments.blurb: England faces Panama in a crucial FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match on Saturday, June 27, kicking off at 10 PM BST.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: It's match day eve! England are taking on Panama in the World Cup tomorrow at 10 PM BST. Get your shirts ready and let's go! #ThreeLions

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: World Cup fever is building! England play Panama tomorrow night. Where will you be watching the game?

moments.title: Pete Tong Ibiza Classics at Blenheim
moments.blurb: Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, featuring The Essential Orchestra, performs at the Blenheim Palace Festival in Oxfordshire on Saturday, June 27.

angles.name: Dance Anthem
angles.copy: Pete Tong and The Essential Orchestra bring the Ibiza Classics to Blenheim Palace tomorrow! Get ready for a night of dance anthems under the stars. ✨

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: If you're heading to Blenheim Palace Festival for Pete Tong Ibiza Classics on Saturday, you're in for a treat! What's your favourite classic dance track?

moments.title: Blackbird Festival at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Blackbird Festival, featuring Alter Bridge and Skindred, takes place at Cardiff Castle on Saturday, June 27.

angles.name: Rock Out Cardiff
angles.copy: Cardiff, are you ready to rock? Blackbird Festival hits Cardiff Castle tomorrow with Alter Bridge and Skindred! Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Welsh Rock
angles.copy: Massive rock day in Cardiff tomorrow! Blackbird Festival brings Alter Bridge and Skindred to the iconic Cardiff Castle grounds. Enjoy the show!

moments.title: Macmillan Mighty Hike Gower
moments.blurb: The Macmillan Mighty Hike is taking place on the Gower Peninsula on Saturday, June 27, with participants tackling a marathon or half marathon walk.

angles.name: Gower Challenge
angles.copy: Good luck to everyone taking on the Macmillan Mighty Hike on the beautiful Gower Peninsula tomorrow! It's a fantastic challenge for a brilliant cause.

angles.name: Local Support
angles.copy: The Gower Peninsula hosts the Macmillan Mighty Hike tomorrow. If you're out and about, give a cheer to the amazing participants raising money for Macmillan!

moments.title: Taylor Swift Tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is currently the number one single on the Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending June 25, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift is officially at Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'. What a track! 👑

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: The UK's current Number 1 is Taylor Swift! Her latest hit 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is dominating the charts. What's your favourite Taylor track?

moments.title: Ian Paice (Deep Purple) at 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and founding member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's iconic drummer, Ian Paice! His incredible talent has powered some of rock's greatest anthems. 🥁

angles.name: Deep Purple Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Deep Purple's Ian Paice on Monday! What's your favourite Deep Purple track featuring his incredible drumming?

moments.title: Colin Hay (Men at Work) at 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive frontman of Men at Work, turns 73 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Men at Work Icon
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the voice of Men at Work, Colin Hay! 'Down Under' is still a classic. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Aussie Legend
angles.copy: Throwback to the 80s! Sending birthday wishes to Colin Hay of Men at Work, who turns 73 on Monday. What a legend!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger at 48
moments.blurb: Singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, she's a true star. 💖

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls Throwback
angles.copy: It's Nicole Scherzinger's birthday on Monday! What's your ultimate Pussycat Dolls anthem? Let us know!

moments.title: Alanis Morissette at Blenheim
moments.blurb: Seven-time GRAMMY winner Alanis Morissette brings her beloved anthems to the Blenheim Palace Festival in Oxfordshire on Sunday, June 28.

angles.name: 90s Icon Live
angles.copy: Jagged Little Pill live! Alanis Morissette is at Blenheim Palace Festival on Sunday. Which of her classic tracks are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Festival Rock
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival continues this weekend with Alanis Morissette on Sunday! Get ready for some powerful vocals and iconic tunes.

moments.title: Debbie Harry (Blondie) at 81
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! The legendary Blondie frontwoman still rocks. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: Blondie Forever
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic birthday to Debbie Harry on Wednesday! Her influence on music and style is undeniable. What's your go-to Blondie track?

moments.title: Missy Elliott at 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the iconic Missy Elliott! A true trailblazer in music. What's your favourite Missy track to get down to?

angles.name: Groundbreaking Artist
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the incredible Missy Elliott on Wednesday! Her creativity and impact on music are unmatched.

moments.title: Katy Perry at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Katy Perry performs live at Cardiff Castle on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Pop Extravaganza
angles.copy: Cardiff, get ready to roar! Katy Perry is bringing her spectacular show to Cardiff Castle on Tuesday. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Welsh Pop Night
angles.copy: Tuesday night is going to be electric in Cardiff as Katy Perry takes over the Castle! What's your ultimate Katy Perry singalong?

moments.title: Teddy Swims at Blenheim
moments.blurb: Vocal powerhouse Teddy Swims performs at the Blenheim Palace Festival in Oxfordshire on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: Teddy Swims is bringing his incredible voice to Blenheim Palace Festival on Tuesday! If you're going, prepare for some serious soulful vibes.

angles.name: Live Music
angles.copy: Catch Teddy Swims live at Blenheim Palace Festival this Tuesday! Which of his hits are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Love Trails Festival on Gower
moments.blurb: The Love Trails Festival, a unique blend of trail running, wellness, and music, takes place at Weobley Castle on the Gower Peninsula from July 2-6.

angles.name: Gower Adventure
angles.copy: Get ready for adventure! Love Trails Festival kicks off on the Gower Peninsula next Thursday, combining runs, wellness, and great music. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Unique Festival
angles.copy: Looking for a festival with a difference? Love Trails Festival begins July 2nd at Weobley Castle on the Gower. Perfect for active music lovers!

moments.title: Exeter Summer Concerts Continue
moments.blurb: Exeter's 'Summer Concerts @ Swasey Parkway' series continues next Thursday, July 2, with a performance by North River Music.

source.l: Town of Exeter New Hampshire Official Website

angles.name: Local Tunes
angles.copy: Enjoying the summer evenings in Exeter! The Summer Concerts @ Swasey Parkway continue next Thursday, July 2, with North River Music. Don't miss out!

angles.name: Free Entertainment
angles.copy: Looking for free entertainment in Exeter? The Summer Concerts series is back at Swasey Parkway next Thursday with North River Music. Grab a blanket!

moments.title: Cardiff Food & Drink Festival
moments.blurb: The popular Cardiff Food and Drink Festival returns to Roald Dahl Plass in Cardiff Bay from July 3-5, offering a wide range of local and international produce.

angles.name: Foodie Fun Cardiff
angles.copy: Calling all foodies! The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival is back in Roald Dahl Plass from July 3rd-5th. Get ready for some delicious treats! 😋

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival kicks off next Friday in Cardiff Bay. Perfect for trying new flavours and enjoying the atmosphere.

moments.title: Vince Clarke (Erasure) at 66
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the electronic music pioneer known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on Friday, July 3.

angles.name: Synth Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his electronic genius shaped a generation. What's your favourite synth-pop classic?

angles.name: Erasure Fan
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Erasure's Vince Clarke on Friday! Get ready to dance to some timeless tracks. What's your go-to Erasure song?

moments.title: Carl Barât (The Libertines) at 48
moments.blurb: Carl Barât, co-frontman of The Libertines and Dirty Pretty Things, turns 48 on Friday, July 3.

angles.name: Indie Rock Star
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to Carl Barât of The Libertines! An indie rock icon. What's your favourite track from The Libertines or Dirty Pretty Things?

angles.name: Libertines Love
angles.copy: Celebrating Carl Barât's birthday on Friday! Which Libertines song instantly takes you back?

moments.title: George Clinton at 85
moments.blurb: George Clinton, the legendary pioneer of funk music with Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on Monday, July 6.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only Dr. Funkenstein, George Clinton! The mastermind behind Parliament-Funkadelic. Get down with the funk! 🕺

angles.name: P-Funk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of funk icon George Clinton on Monday! What's your favourite Parliament or Funkadelic track?

moments.title: 50 Cent at 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) turns 51 on Monday, July 6.

angles.name: Hip Hop Star
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only 50 Cent! From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to 'Power', he's a legend. What's your favourite 50 Cent track?

angles.name: Rap Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating 50 Cent's birthday on Monday! Which of his anthems gets you hyped?
